title: [CI:BUILD] rpm: spdx compatible license field
body:
The lowercase `and` in the License field isn't compatible with spdx license format.

This commit replaces all `and` with `AND` in the License field in spec.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read and understood our contributing guidelines
(https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) as well as ensuring

-->

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

rpm license fix

#### How to verify it

use the `license-fedora2spdx` tool if you're curious.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

None. Only affects rpms.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?
